titleStmt.title: SII 16.20: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 20. (A.R. No. 321 of 1922.) TAṀBAḶḶAPALLE, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the back of the slab, containing No. 17 above, in front of the Mallikārjuna temple on the Mallayyakoṇḍa to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1328, Vyaya, Vaīśākha śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to 1406 A.D., April 19, °57.

It registers that Siṅgari-nāyaka, son of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Kāmu Dōrappanāyaka and Bujjava had the shrine of Vīrabhadra constructed and a raṅgamaṇḍapa built for it in the temple of Mallikārjuna of Chandragiri and granted lands for a flower- garden, cows and cash endowment for offerings to the deities for the merit of the Rāya and the members of his own family. The donor is said to have been a subordinate of Antappa-daṇṇāyaka and Narasiṁhadēva Voḍeya, the ministers of Dēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa
ṁbulu 1328 Agunēṭi vyayasaṁvatsa
ra vayiśāka śu 1 sō śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēsvara rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara ha�
rāyavibhāḷa bāśakatappuvarāyaragaṁ
ḍa pūrvvapaścimadakṣiṇōttaracatusamu
drādhipati śrīvīradēvarāyamahārāyani
rājyānaku sirōmaṇulayina śrīmanmahā
pradhānulu Aṁtappadaṁṇṇāyaṁkulakuṁn
narasiṁhyadēvayōḍeyalakuṁnu nijabhri
tyuṁḍayina śrīmanmahānāyaṁkācāryya
kāvērivalaba kaṭakacūrakāra gaṁḍaracōla ma
reyōkaḍekāvapāla veṁkalikulamunaṁdu ku
ladīpakaprasiddhuṁḍayina kāmu dōrappanāyi
nikiṁni bujjavanāyaṁkurālikiṁni suputra
kuladīpakuḍu satyadhaṁrmapati pālakuṁḍayina Read pari
dōrappanāyini siṁgarināyiniṁgāru yī ma
hārāyalakun tama tallidaṁḍrulakuṁnu tama
Aṁnadaṁmulakuṁnu tamakuṁnu pu(ṁ)ṇya
mugānu śrīcaṁdragiri mallikārjunadēvara guḍiṁ
vīrabhadradēvaraguḍiṁni raṁgamaṁḍapamuṁnu
yiṁtavaṭuṁnu ko ttagāsu tama cētidhanamu ve
ṭi kaṭiṁci rāyani paḷyāla taruvātanu Ā siṁ
garināyanigāru tama pēriṭanu Oka paḷyamu
samarpiṁcumani kalaṁtagālamuku rokamu
Ā stānāpatulaku yice gāna yi paḷyamu tappa
kuṁḍānu stānāpatulu Āruvāḍlavāruṁnū
dēvaraku samarppiṁcuvāru yī dēvara divyadhā
raku kilāru pasulānu peṭenu yi stānamaṁdu
nēlagoni dēvarapūjaku puṣpālatoṁṭalun peṭi
ṁci yiṁtavaṭu daṁrmamusēsi yi stānamu sarvva
mā�yamugānu maṁniṁcci pratipāliṁcenu yī dē
para puramun yi stānikulānu sarvvamānyamu
gā maṁniṁce gāna Ā siṁgarināyinigārikiṁni Ā
yana biḍḍalakunu dhanakanakavastuvāhanaputrapa
vutrābhivriddhigānu śrīcaṁdragiri mallikārjuna
dēvara Ācaṁdrārkkamun yici krupādriṣṭi
jūci rakṣiṁpunu maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī
śrīśrīśrī mārajiyyala malupeda malla
jiyyala pāpajiyyala malu yī muṁgi
rilōni Ārokapālivāru malajiyyala
vīrapa mārajiyyalabālu vīru tamakuṁ ce
le Ārokapāluṁnu Enimidi lānu
vāru Anubhaviṁturu nāgajiyya
la bayirabayyala gaṁgu cala Eṟamajiyyala
Anaṁtajiyyala vīru tamaku celle Ārokapā
luṁnu tamalōnayina vārelānu Anubhaviṁ
turu sādajiyyala pāpana yeravīrapa malajiyya
la mallajiyyala pāpana vīru tamaku cellē Āro
kapāluṁnu tama Aṁnadaṁmulalōnu Anu
bhaviṁturu boṁdujiyyalakoḍuku na jiyya
laku sādajiyyala gaṁgajiyyalagāri vārilōnu
naku cele pālu Anubhaviṁcunu .
Digital edition of SII 16.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
